Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Verify that the system redirects to the main page.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the main page.

Title: Incorrect Login Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter the incorrect username and password.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Valid Input and Successful Query Execution
Test Steps:
1. Provide valid input.
2. Click on the submit button.
3. Verify that the query is executed successfully.
4. Check that there is no error message.
Expected Result: The query is executed successfully, and no error message is displayed.

Title: Invalid Input and Query Failure
Test Steps:
1. Provide invalid input.
2. Click on the submit button.
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.
4. Check that the query is not executed.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the query is not executed.

Title: Successful Creation and Database Insertion
Preconditions: User has all necessary information to create an object.
Test Data: Object details: name = "test object", description = "test description"
Test Steps:
1. Provide all necessary information to create an object.
2. Click on the submit button.
3. Verify that the query is executed successfully.
4. Check that there is no error message.
Expected Result: The object is created successfully, and no error message is displayed.

Title: Failed Database Insertion and Retry
Preconditions: User has all necessary information but the database insertion fails.
Test Data: Object details: name = "test object", description = "test description"
Test Steps:
1. Provide all necessary information to create an object.
2. Click on the submit button.
3. Verify that an error message is displayed.
4. Check that the query is retried.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the query is retried.
